creator: ats@first.gmd.de
text:
The Makefile is upgraded for a newer lbdb version 0.9.15, but the
files/md5 file is not upgraded and contains only a checksum for
0.9.14.

Fix: 

Generate a new checksum ?
How-To-Repeat: Do a make checksum in /usr/ports/mail/lbdb. Error is:
ats@freebsd.first.gmd.de[61] make checksum
